name: Mountain View A-Frame · Hot Tub · Asheville
description: Hand-built A-frame cabin with full mountain views. Outdoor hot tub, wood-burning fireplace, screened porch. Coffee from a local Asheville roaster on the counter. Sleeps 4 — one king upstairs in the loft, one queen on the main floor. Pet-friendly with notice. 12 minutes to downtown Asheville and the River Arts District.

reviews.comments: Absolutely perfect. Maya thought of everything. The coffee was a really nice touch.
Hot tub under the stars sold it. Bring boots — the path from the parking spot is steep when wet.
